action.description: May operations activate the production feature at the queued time?

context.action_boundary: May operations activate the production feature at the queued time?
context.anomaly_observed: A same-day effective record exists, but the exact effective time must authorize execution now.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-FAR-054 queues feature FX-22 for production account AC-8 under release condition RC-9 at 10:30.
Effective record EFF-FAR-054 covers FX-22, production, account AC-8, release condition RC-9, effective start 09:10 before the queued 10:30 activation.

policy_documents.content: Activation is complete only when effective start time is before the queued activation time and the record matches feature, environment, account, and release condition.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
